analysis.reasoning: Core message: China and Tanzania held an online conference to share experiences using traditional medicine against COVID-19 and pledged to strengthen cooperation in applying traditional medicine to treat diseases. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not mentioned; no criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes—emphasizes international cooperation, knowledge-sharing, and helping treat diseases, portraying China as a cooperative, supportive actor. CH3 (epic history): Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically): Not discussed; focus is international cooperation, not China's domestic system. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): No explicit claim about domestic achievements or leadership supremacy; only cooperation. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not about culture or tourism. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
